title: polygala pendulina
intro: Polygala pendulina, also known as Rock Bells or Fairy Bells, is a perennial herbaceous plant belonging to the family Polygalaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Polygala pendulina include its potential to support immune function and reduce symptoms of allergies and respiratory issues. Traditionally, the plant is prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion, and has been used in herbal medicine to promote overall well-being and alleviate respiratory issues.
